channel.title: Apple OS Releases
channel.description: iOS, macOS, iPadOS, watchOS — 正式版与测试版更新推送

item.title: Apple OS 更新 (4) — 2026-03-18
item.description: ━━ 测试版 ━━ ▸ iOS 26.4 Rc (23E244) — iPhone 17 Pro ▸ iPadOS 26.4 Rc (23E244) — iPad Pro M5 ▸ macOS 26.4 Rc (25E243) — MacBook Pro M5 ▸ watchOS 26.4 Rc (23T239)

item.title: Apple OS 更新 (5) — 2026-03-11
item.description: ━━ 正式版 ━━ ▸ macOS 26.3.2 (25D2140) — 仅限 MacBook Neo ━━ 测试版 ━━ ▸ iOS 26.4 Beta 4 (23E5234a) — iPhone 17 Pro ▸ iPadOS 26.4 Beta 4 (23E5234a) — iPad Pro M5 ▸ macOS 26.4 Beta 4 (25E5233c) — MacBook Pro M5 ▸ watchOS 26.4 Beta 4 (23T5236a)
